name: @myndhyve/wop-conformance
description: Black-box conformance test suite for WOP-compliant servers. FINAL v1.0 (suite at 1.10.0). 1.10.0 adds pack-registry read-shape scenarios + 19-code PUT publish error-catalog placeholders + a `private.<host>.*`-scoped pack-manifest fixture exercising the widened schema pattern (closes Q6 spec/conformance gap). 1.9.0 adds approval-payload vocabulary scenarios (§7 drift audit closure for Q7) + adopts spec corrections in c0d63ae. 1.8.0 vendored api/openapi.yaml + api/asyncapi.yaml + schemas/*.schema.json into the published tarball.
